//: lint_duplicate_helpers baseline — module-level helper names defined in >=2 in-scope defender/ modules. Fingerprint is the bare name. CI fails on a dup name absent here. Regenerate: python scripts/lint/lint_duplicate_helpers.py --update-baseline. Shrink as dups are consolidated; annotate intentional entries, "" = un-triaged. Never hand-add to silence a new dup — fix it or use `# lint-dup: ok — <reason>`.

entries._author_to_author: debt: author.py parallel run+partition pending fold onto the curator engine — see #386
entries._json_safe: distinct-ok: serialize.py coerces YAML scalars (dates/sets) for JSON; sql.py maps non-finite floats to null for DuckDB — different problems
entries._partition_pre_author: debt: author.py parallel pre-flight partition pending fold onto the curator engine — see #386
entries._request: distinct-ok: stub_transport returns dict|list and sys.exit(2) (adapter exit-code protocol); ticket_writer returns (status, body) non-fatally — different contracts
entries._run: distinct-ok: generic subprocess-runner name; the harness pair share one, but sql.py's _run is a DuckDB executor and validate_scaffold's is its own — distinct bodies
entries._run_batch_inner: debt: author.py parallel batch driver pending fold onto the curator engine — see #386
entries.acquire_queue_lock: debt: queue-lock wrapper name-collision (curator + lead_author each wrap _shared.acquire_flock) — see #386
entries.capture: distinct-ok: harness_lead writes eval result artifacts; record_query runs an adapter into the queries table — unrelated roles, same name
entries.invoke_agent: distinct-ok: per-direction author agents (different prompt/allowed-tools); lead_author.invoke_agent is a different agent (lead curation)
entries.materialize: distinct-ok: the two eval harnesses build tmp trees from different fixtures (findings/lessons vs query-catalog/run-dir)
entries.read_batch: debt: author.py parallel queue snapshot pending fold onto the curator engine — see #386
entries.release_queue_lock: debt: queue-lock wrapper name-collision (curator + lead_author each wrap _shared.release_flock) — see #386
entries.rotate_queue: debt: author.py parallel queue rotation pending fold onto the curator engine — see #386
entries.run_batch: debt: author.py parallel batch driver pending fold onto the _author_curator (CuratorConfig) engine — see #386
entries.validate_agent_result_partition: debt: author.py parallel partition validator pending fold onto the curator engine — see #386
entries.verify_agent_state: debt: author.py + curator parallel state check pending fold onto the curator engine — see #386
